name: Lactic Acid
description: A gentle AHA that acts as both an exfoliant and a humectant.
scientificSummary: Loosens dead skin cells while pulling moisture directly into the newly exposed skin layers.
mechanismOfAction: Loosens dead skin cells while pulling moisture directly into the newly exposed skin layers.
